destinations.name: Cape Town
destinations.summary: Discover why Cape Town is the world's top destination. From Table Mountain hikes to Cape Winelands tours, plan your perfect South African escape with Safari.com.

destinations.name: Ngorongoro Crater
destinations.summary:
The Ngorongoro Crater is one of the highlights of safaris in Tanzania.
This unique setting arises from an ancient volcanic caldera.
It's openness gives rise to an extraordinary abundance of animals that visitors can see - it's quite common to see the Big 5 in a single day.

destinations.name: Okavango Delta
destinations.summary:
The Okavango is a lush habitat where animals abound.
If you know much about Southern African safaris, you'll know the climates are generally dry and water holes are often where guides will take travellers to try and spot wildlife.
In the Okavango, the entire area is a wetland and it makes for abundant wildlife sightings with unique activities like canoeing, boat trips and game drivers.

destinations.name: Serengeti National Park
destinations.summary:
The Serengeti National Park is one of Tanzania's best kept treasures.
The sough after destination has visitors coming to see the famous Wildebeest migration.
It can work as a singular destination or part of a larger itinerary incorporating nearby areas like the Ngorongoro Crater.

brands.name: Jao Collection
brands.summary: The Jao Collection is the independent home of the six camps in the Okavango Delta’s Jao Reserve (NG25), an exclusive private concession held by the Kays family. Jao, Kwetsani, Jacana, Tubu Tree, Little Tubu and Pelo span water and dry-land Delta, from architectural flagship luxury to intimate back-to-nature camps.

brands.name: Lalibela Wildlife Reserve
brands.summary: Step into the heart of a pristine wildlife reserve, where sweeping landscapes and extraordinary wildlife greet you at every turn. Embark on authentic open-vehicle safaris for an intimate, immersive connection with nature, then return to the serene luxury of our accommodations, where comfort and tranquility await.

brands.name: Machaba Safaris
brands.summary: Family-run since 2012, Machaba Safaris operates a tight portfolio of owner-led camps across Botswana, spanning the Okavango, Khwai and Chobe. Classic safari styling, conservation-first thinking, and a culture of hands-on hosting that's hard to fake at scale.

experiences.name: Child-friendly safaris
experiences.summary: The lodges our safari specialists trust with young children, whether you want them looked after while you take a breather, or joining every game drive.

experiences.name: Sleep-out safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured sleep-out programme. Curated by our specialists from properties offering genuine overnight experiences under the stars.

experiences.name: Horseback safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured horseback programme. Curated by our specialists from properties offering genuine riding among wildlife.

experiences.name: Luxury Rail Journeys
experiences.summary: Incorporating a great train journey into your travel itinerary adds a unique perspective to your vacation. With some of the best-escorted rail tours in the world, traveling by train in Southern Africa has become a firm favorite in recent years. Rail passage to game reserves, through Winelands, to historic sites and across the wide-open countryside of the Karoo region, creates an extraordinary travel experience.

experiences.name: Hot Air Ballooning Tours & Safaris
experiences.summary: Floating above it all in a hot-air balloon gives you the best take on the expanse of wildlife areas in Southern & East Africa. What amazes most first-time balloonists is the absolute stillness: the silence as you float above the scenic plains, desert dunes, forests, and rivers in Africa. Even if you’ve flown elsewhere, this is a unique experience. Balloon flights last an hour or so, drifting wherever the air currents take you, and with ample opportunities for photography and video filming. In the time-honored tradition of balloon flights the world over, you toast your return to earth with a champagne breakfast. Most Balloon Safaris end with some leisurely game viewing on the way back to your lodge or camp. With our in-depth knowledge and first-hand experience of Southern and East Africa, we’re able to custom-make a safari, with all the added adventures and activities, to suit your individual preferences and budget. Let's start planning!

experiences.name: Photographic Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured photographic programme. Curated by our specialists from properties built for serious wildlife photography.

experiences.name: Walking Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured walking programme. Curated by our specialists from properties that have built the discipline into the safari, not added it as an afterthought.

experiences.name: Bush & Beach Safaris
experiences.summary: The most associated environment for wildlife is African savanna. However a few locations are unique in that the environment is near the ocean, presenting a unique opportunity to experience "bush and beach" safaris.

experiences.name: Family Safaris
experiences.summary: The lodges our safari specialists pick for families travelling together. Family suites, interleading rooms and exclusive-use villas, with the space for several generations under one roof.

experiences.name: Honeymoon Safaris
experiences.summary: Lodges with a structured honeymoon programme. Curated by our specialists from properties that genuinely cater to couples celebrating a wedding.

experiences.name: Luxury Safaris
experiences.summary: Africa's top-tier safari lodges and itineraries. Curated by our specialists alongside the editors who set the international benchmark for the category: Condé Nast Traveler, Travel + Leisure, AFAR, Forbes and Robb Report.

experiences.name: Gorilla & Chimp Trekking
experiences.summary:
Another truly unique experience in Africa is the ability to get up close and personal with natures largest living primates - the Gorillas of Uganda and Rwanda. Professional guides take you into the forests and ensure protocols for safety without compromising the raw energy and thrill of the experience.
Below are some of the packaged safaris and lodges that allow you to take part in this riveting phenomonen.

experiences.name: Great Migration
experiences.summary:
The Great Migration is an ecological marvel. Each year, nearly 2 million animals - predominantly zebra, wildebeest and gazelle - move between the Serengeti in Tanzania, and the Masai Mara in Kenya.
The picture is reminiscent of a scene from the Jungle Book. Open plains filled with vast number of animals in every direction.

experiences.name: Big 5 Safaris
experiences.summary: The most common reason anyone comes on a real African Safari, is to see the Big 5 - Elephants, Lion, Leopard, Rhino and African Buffalo. They are the "Coca Cola" of safari wildlife. Seeing them in their natural habitat - as opposed to a theme park or a zoo - is what makes safaris in Africa so special. While fairly common throughout parks and game reserves in Africa, there are certain regions where they abound, and below are some of the places one is almost guaranteed to see all 5, perhaps even in a day!

experiences.name: Travel specials
experiences.summary: We pride ourselves in being in touch with the market. There are a lot of specials out there and we capture the majority on the site. They come in the form of straight discounts, stayX/payY or even based on short notice bookings. On this page we've curated only the very best!

With premium accommodations, scenic flights, and exceptional experiences, this trip offers the perfect blend of adventure, wildlife, and natural wonder.

Immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of the V&A Waterfront, where you can delight in the unique flavors of Cape Town's cuisine. Next, venture into the wild beauty of the Kruger National Park, traveling through the captivating Kapama Game Reserve. Arrive at the exquisite five-star Kapama River Lodge, where the expansive design and open spaces provide a constant connection to the breathtaking African skies.

safaris.name: 7-Day Iconic Kruger & Cape Town
safaris.summary: Experience the best of South Africa with this perfect combination of a Big 5 safari in the Kruger National Park and the vibrant "Mother City" of Cape Town. Spend 3 nights on safari in the world-renowned Kruger National Park, home to a larger diversity of wildlife than anywhere else in Africa followed by 3 nights in Cape Town, often voted the most beautiful city in the world. This 7-day tour is the ideal option for explorers looking to experience the best of what South Africa has to offer.
highlights: 3 nights at Imbali Safari Lodge in Kruger's Mluwati Concession
Twice-daily Big Five game drives with guide and tracker
Luxury tented suites with private plunge pools above the N'waswitsontso River
3 nights at The Cape Milner Boutique Hotel in Cape Town
Free days to explore Cape Point, Simon's Town penguins and the peninsula
Internal flights from Johannesburg to Hoedspruit and on to Cape Town included

safaris.name: 8-Day Chobe to Sabi Sands: The Ultimate Wildlife Journey
safaris.summary: Discover the best of Southern Africa on this 8-day luxury safari combining Botswana’s Chobe National Park and South Africa’s iconic Sabi Sand Game Reserve. Begin with a stay at Muchenje Safari Lodge, known for its panoramic views and exclusive night drives in Chobe. Enjoy game drives, boat safaris, and cultural encounters before returning to Johannesburg for a restful overnight stay. Then journey to Inyati Safari Lodge in the heart of BIG 5 territory, where daily game drives and walking safaris offer unforgettable wildlife experiences.
highlights: 3 nights at Muchenje Safari Lodge on Chobe's quieter western edge
Chobe River cruise, cultural village visit and exclusive night drive
Overnight at African Rock Hotel near OR Tambo with complimentary massage
3 nights at Inyati Game Lodge in the Sabi Sand Game Reserve
Big Five game drives and walking safaris with rangers and Shangaan trackers
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Kasane and Skukuza included

safaris.name: 3-Day Sabi Sands Luxury Arathusa Lodge Safari
safaris.summary: Explore the world-famous Sabi Sand Private Game Reserve, where you will get the chance to lay your eyes on several of Africa's Big Five as well as the smaller wonders of the bush. Become immersed in nature from the comfort of your camp, where there are plenty of relaxation spaces to soak up the sights of the African bush! Your trip includes return flights from/to Johannesburg, all meals, and game drives.
highlights: 2 nights at Arathusa Safari Lodge in the Sabi Sand Private Game Reserve
Twice-daily game drives with experienced rangers tracking the Big Five
Guided bush walk and sundowner stops at sunset
Optional tracker's course or visit to Shangana Cultural Village
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg OR Tambo and all meals included

safaris.name: 4-Day All-Inclusive Fly-In Sabi Sand Safari
highlights: 3 nights at Arathusa Safari Lodge in the Sabi Sand Game Reserve
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives with expert guides
Big Five sightings in one of Africa's top wildlife reserves
Guided bush walk through the reserve
All meals plus house wines, beers and spirits included
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Hoedspruit with transfers

safaris.name: 7-Day Fly-In Cape Town to Kruger Luxury Safari
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxury safari from the stunning Cape Town Waterfront Village to the deep wilderness of Simbavati Waterside Klaserie Nature Reserve.
highlights: 3 nights at Waterfront Village on Cape Town's V&A Marina
Walking distance to Two Oceans Aquarium, Watershed and Food Market
Fly to Hoedspruit for 3 nights at Simbavati Waterside Lodge
Twice-daily game drives at a dam frequented by wildlife year-round
Bush walk, spa treatments and boma dinners under the stars
All flights and transfers between Cape Town, Hoedspruit and Johannesburg included

safaris.name: 7-Day Ultra-Lux Kruger and Vic Falls Fly-in Safari
safaris.summary: This meticulously planned safari transports guests into two stunning wilderness realms, featuring stays at prestigious luxury lodges and savoring African cuisine beneath the open sky. Begin your adventure in Kruger National Park at Lukimbi Safari Lodge, where you'll reside in a classic suite with superb game viewing opportunities from an expansive private deck. Then, journey to witness the majestic spray of Victoria Falls, staying in a deluxe room at the Palm River Hotel.
highlights: 3 nights at Lukimbi Safari Lodge in Kruger National Park
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives and guided bush walks
Suite with private deck, indoor and outdoor showers overlooking the river
3 nights at the 5-star Palm River Hotel in Victoria Falls
3-course dinner at Cassia Restaurant, Ilala Lodge Hotel
All flights from Johannesburg to Kruger, on to Vic Falls and back

safaris.name: 5 Day Fly-in Safari to Timbavati Game Reserve
safaris.summary: Motswari Private Game Lodge, nestled in the heart of the Timbavati Private Nature Reserve in South Africa, offers an authentic and intimate safari experience.
highlights: 4 nights at Motswari Private Game Lodge in Timbavati
Twice-daily game drives in a Big Five reserve
Chance to track Timbavati's famed white lions and leopards
All meals, house wines, local spirits and beers included
Round-trip flights from OR Tambo to Hoedspruit with transfers

safaris.name: 12-Day Rovos Rail Namibia to South Africa Safari
safaris.summary: This journey commences in Walvis Bay, Namibia, traversing the Namib Desert to Otjiwarongo, where guests can observe desert-adapted wildlife in Etosha National Park. Experience the iconic red dunes of Sossusvlei and marvel at the quiver trees in Garas Park. Explore Luderitz for its colonial architecture and abundant wildlife, including seals and flamingos, before visiting the largest canyon in the southern hemisphere. Discover Upington and enjoy an exclusive cruise on the Orange River as you cross into South Africa to explore the Diamond Mine Museum in Kimberley.
highlights: 9 nights aboard Rovos Rail from Walvis Bay to Pretoria
1 night at Etosha Lodge with afternoon and morning game drives
Visit to the Cheetah Conservation Fund in Otjiwarongo
1 night in Sossusvlei with desert drive, bush dinner and Deadvlei
Walking the ghost town of Kolmanskop and colonial Lüderitz
Fish River Canyon, Orange River cruise and Kimberley's Big Hole

safaris.name: 15-Day Classic Southern Africa Experience — Cape Town, Kruger, Victoria Falls
highlights: 3 nights at the Victoria & Alfred Hotel exploring Cape Town and Table Mountain
Cape Point, Boulders Beach penguins and Cape Winelands tastings
2 nights at Tintswalo Atlantic in Hout Bay, then 2 at La Cotte Farm in Franschhoek
4 nights at Sabi Sabi Bush Lodge with twice-daily game drives and Big Five viewing
3 nights at Tintswalo Siankaba on the Zambezi with sunset cruises and a guided Victoria Falls tour
All internal Airlink flights and transfers between Cape Town, Kruger and Livingstone

safaris.name: 4 Day Rovos Rail Pretoria to Cape Town
safaris.summary: Incorporating a great train journey into your travel itinerary adds a unique perspective to your vacation. With some of the best-escorted rail tours in the world, traveling by train in Southern Africa has become a firm favorite in recent years.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Rovos Rail from Pretoria to Cape Town
Tour of Kimberley's Diamond Mine Museum and the Big Hole
Stop at the Victorian village of Matjiesfontein in the Karoo
Scenic passage through the Hex River Valley into Cape Town
All meals, beverages and excursions included on board

safaris.name: 4-Day All-Inclusive Lion Sands Tinga Lodge Safari
safaris.summary: The lodge's limited number of suites ensures guests experience the utmost privacy and bespoke service. Crafted to harmonize with the natural environment, the suites feature expansive windows and outdoor showers, immersing guests in the wilderness. Renowned for its enchanting atmosphere and unmatched wildlife encounters. Tinga Lodge promises an unforgettable safari.
highlights: 3 nights at Lion Sands Tinga Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Private 125-square-metre suite with plunge pool and outdoor shower
Twice-daily game drives plus guided bush walks
Bush dinners and stargazing from your suite's elevated deck
All meals, selected drinks and Skukuza Airport transfers included

safaris.name: 4-day Chobe National Park safari
safaris.summary: Exclusive ALL-INCLUSIVE Luxury Experience - Promotion 33% off when booking between 15 November to 31 March, excluding 20 December to 10 January,
highlights: 3 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge, an 8-suite property overlooking the Chobe floodplain
Private concession in Chobe Forest Reserve, 3 km from the national park
Game-viewing by boat on the Chobe River alongside the area's vast elephant herds
Bush walks, night drives, full-day safaris and birding included
All meals, local drinks and laundry included, with transfers from Kasane Airport

safaris.name: 7 Day Cape Town to Durban Rovos Rail
safaris.summary: This extravagantly luxurious 7-day steam train rail journey begins in the bustling city of Cape Town, traverses a variety of diverse regions across South Africa, and ends in the wonderfully warm seaside city of Durban.
highlights: 5 nights aboard Rovos Rail's Pride of Africa, Cape Town to Durban
1 night at the 5-star Sheraton Hotel in Pretoria with city tour
Stops at Victorian-era Matjiesfontein and Kimberley's Big Hole
Big Five game drive in the 20,000-acre Nambiti Conservancy
Visit to Ardmore Ceramics in the Drakensberg foothills
Scenic travel through the Cape Winelands, Karoo and Valley of a Thousand Hills

safaris.name: 7-Day Cape Town to the Coast: Luxury Train & Beach Escape
safaris.summary: This luxury train and beach escape offers a unique blend of timeless luxury, rich history and breathtaking beach views.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Rovos Rail in a Pullman Suite from Pretoria to Cape Town
Guided tour of Kimberley's Big Hole and Diamond Mine Museum
Stop at Matjiesfontein, a preserved Victorian railway village in the Karoo
3 nights at St James Manor, a seaside guesthouse on the Cape Peninsula
Day exploring Kalk Bay harbour, galleries and fresh seafood restaurants
All meals and beverages on board, plus airport and station transfers

safaris.name: 7-Day Victoria Falls and Chobe: Classic Railway Safari Adventure
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxurious, scenic journey aboard the Rovos Rail from Pretoria to Victoria Falls, where the elegance of train travel meets the beauty of Southern Africa. Once you arrive, indulge in an exciting 3-night stay at Ngoma Safari Lodge, where game drives — both on land and water — await. Savour exquisite cuisine crafted by the lodge’s talented chefs, who showcase the rich cultural flavours of Botswana, offering you an unforgettable culinary experience.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Rovos Rail in a Pullman Suite from Pretoria to Victoria Falls
Gourmet meals and all beverages included throughout the rail journey
3 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking Chobe National Park
Game drives among Chobe's renowned elephant herds
Boat safari on the Chobe River for hippo, croc and birdlife
All road transfers between Victoria Falls Station, Kasane Airport and the lodge

safaris.name: The Kyle Richards Lion Sands Safari Package
safaris.summary: Embark on the exclusive 4-day safari at Hinkwenu Residence in Lion Sands Tinga Lodge, the very safari where we were lucky enough to host Kyle Richards in October 2024. Nestled in the heart of the African wilderness, this retreat offers every corner for you to savor. Enhance your adventure with a private safari vehicle and a dedicated team of field guides and trackers. Your experience is further elevated by a residence chef who crafts meals tailored to your specifications. Conclude your journey with a romantic night under the African sky, where the stars add the ultimate touch of romance to your stay in the Tinyeleti Treehouse.
highlights: 2 nights in the exclusive-use Hi'nkwenu Residence at Lion Sands Tinga Lodge
Private game vehicle with dedicated FGASA-accredited guide and tracker
Residence chef, butler, concierge and housekeeper on call throughout
One night sleep-out in the Tinyeleti Treehouse under the stars
Game drives in the Sabi Sand and greater Kruger National Park
Round-trip flights from Cape Town and private Skukuza transfers included

safaris.name: 3-Day Fly-In Authentic Rhino Post Safari
safaris.summary: Rhino Post Safari Lodge, in the heart of South Africa's iconic Kruger National Park, is renowned for its exceptional safari experiences and commitment to environmental sustainability. This eco-friendly lodge is strategically positioned in a private wilderness concession, making it an ideal base for intimate wildlife encounters, including the sought-after Big Five.
highlights: 2 nights at Rhino Post Safari Lodge in Kruger National Park
Twice-daily game drives in a private wilderness concession
Big Five viewing including rhino, lion, leopard, elephant and buffalo
Sundowner drink served on the late afternoon game drive
Brunch, high tea and gourmet dinners at the lodge
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Skukuza Airport included

safaris.name: 4-Day African Chic Fly-In Rhino Post Safari
safaris.summary: Rhino Post Safari Lodge, situated within the famed Kruger National Park in South Africa, is celebrated for offering extraordinary safari adventures and its dedication to eco-sustainability. Located in a secluded wilderness concession, this environmentally conscious lodge provides a perfect setting for close-up encounters with wildlife, including the much-desired Big Five.
highlights: 3 nights at Rhino Post Safari Lodge in Kruger National Park
Open-vehicle game drive transfer from Skukuza Airport to the lodge
Two daily safari activities with Big Five viewing
Sundowner drinks on afternoon drives and gourmet outdoor dinners
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg (JNB) to Skukuza (SZK)

safaris.name: 5 Day Kruger Walking Safari Trail
safaris.summary: Get up close and personal with nature on this 5-day walking safari. You will get to truly experience the pristine wilderness of the Kruger National Park while walking through it with specially trained rangers.
highlights: 2 nights at Rhino Plains Camp, then 2 at Rhino Post Safari Lodge
Guided walking safaris with expert trackers in a Big Five concession
Sleep-out under the stars on raised platforms above the bush
Morning and afternoon open-vehicle game drives from Rhino Post
All meals, park fees and game-drive beverages included

safaris.name: 5 Day Sabi Sabi Bush Lodge Package
safaris.summary: Sabi Sabi is a private game reserve in South Africa, situated in the Sabi Sand Game Reserve which flanks the southwestern section of the Kruger National Park. This 5-day tour is the perfect introduction to the ultimate safari experience.
highlights: 4 nights at Sabi Sabi Bush Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Morning and night game drives with skilled rangers and trackers
Big Five off-road tracking in a private reserve
Guided bush walk or visit to a Sabi Sabi-supported local school
Boma dinner under the stars with all beverages included
Round-trip transfers to the lodge included

safaris.name: 7-Day Kruger Park and Vic Falls Combo
safaris.summary: Experience the ultimate safari adventure with a 7-day journey through Kruger National Park and Victoria Falls.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Kruger Shalati, the train on the bridge over the Sabie River
Twice-daily game drives in open Land Rovers across Kruger National Park
3 nights at The Wallow Lodge in Victoria Falls
Full-day Chobe National Park trip with river safari, lunch and game drive
Guided tour of Victoria Falls on the Zimbabwean side
All flights from Johannesburg and internal transfers included

safaris.name: 12-Day Rovos Rail Pretoria to Victoria Falls Safari
safaris.summary: Traverse the Drakensberg Mountains and Panorama Route, enjoy game viewing in Kruger, and explore Maputo in Mozambique. Discover the Kingdom of eSwatini, experience a Kapama game drive, and visit the Great Zimbabwe Monument. Tour Antelope Park, Matobo National Park, and Hwange before arriving at Victoria Falls for a village walk and sunset cruise on the Zambezi River.
highlights: 11 nights aboard Rovos Rail from Pretoria to Victoria Falls
Panorama Route stop at God's Window and Blyde River Canyon
Full-day Kruger game drive and a Kapama Reserve game drive
Cultural visits to Maputo, eSwatini's Mantenga Village and Great Zimbabwe
Matobo National Park tour and game viewing in Hwange
Victoria Falls walking tour and sunset cruise on the Zambezi

safaris.name: 4-Day Jock Safari Lodge Fly-in Package
safaris.summary: Experience an authentic, unfiltered safari like never before on this 4 day safari at Jock Safari Lodge, located within the Kruger National Park. Nestled in the South-Western corner of the renowned Kruger National Park and overlooking the Mitomeni and Biyamiti rivers, which flow as one, Jock Safari Lodge is the perfect place to experience breathtaking wildlife sightings, including the notorious Big 5. Your trip includes return flights from/to Johannesburg, all meals, accommodation with views of the bush, and game drives in a private concession in the Kruger National Park.
highlights: 3 nights at Jock Safari Lodge in a private 6,000-hectare Kruger concession
Suites with private plunge pool and Sala overlooking the riverbed
Twice-daily Big Five game drives with ranger and tracker
Guided wilderness walks and exclusive riverbed traversing rights
All meals, house beverages and spa treatments available on site
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and private lodge transfers

safaris.name: 7-Day Hidden Gem Safari: Cape Town to Pafuri
safaris.summary: Embark on an unforgettable journey to uncover the hidden gems of South Africa. Begin your adventure with a stay at the charming Romney Park in Green Point, a 4-star aparthotel near Cape Town’s iconic V&A Waterfront, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere with exceptional service. Immerse yourself in African culture with a visit to Cape Town’s renowned GOLD Restaurant. Conclude your trip with three nights at Pafuri Camp, nestled along the scenic Luvuvhu River, where you’ll experience the heart of the African bush like never before.
highlights: 3 nights at Romney Park in Green Point near the V&A Waterfront
14-course traditional African dinner at GOLD Restaurant
Cape Town sightseeing including Table Mountain, Cape Point and Boulders Beach
3 nights at Pafuri Camp on the Luvuvhu River in northern Kruger
Twice-daily game drives and a guided walking safari through fever tree forests
Return flights from Cape Town and charter transfers to Pafuri Airstrip

safaris.name: 8-Day Luxe Getaway from Sabi Sabi to Mauritius
safaris.summary: A luxurious 7-day escape blending thrilling South African safaris at Sabi Sabi Earth Lodge with serene beachfront relaxation at Le Jadis Resort in Mauritius.
highlights: 4 nights at Sabi Sabi Earth Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives and walking safaris with expert trackers
Big Five viewing followed by spa treatments and private-deck plunge pools
3 nights at Le Jadis Beach Resort on Mauritius's northwest coast
Beachfront infinity pool, snorkelling, diving and four gourmet restaurants
All flights included: JNB to Sabi Sabi airstrip and onward to Mauritius

safaris.name: 6-Day Cape Town to Port Elizabeth Winter Fly-in Package
safaris.summary: Experience the best of South Africa in just six days — from Cape Town’s iconic waterfront to a luxury Big 5 safari at Kuzuko Lodge. A perfect blend of city charm and wilderness adventure. Book your stay between 1 May to 30 September and 1 to 19 December for a discounted rate.
highlights: 2 nights at the Victoria & Alfred Hotel on Cape Town's V&A Waterfront
Free days to explore Table Mountain, Robben Island and the Bo-Kaap
3 nights at Kuzuko Lodge in a 35,000-acre malaria-free Big 5 reserve
Twice-daily game drives, guided bush walks and night drives with spotlight
Four-course Karoo gourmet dining and afternoon high tea at the lodge
Round-trip flights between Cape Town and Port Elizabeth with all transfers

safaris.name: 14 Day Self Drive Luxury Garden Route
safaris.summary: Dive into the sophisticated elegance of South Africa as you travel through its captivating landscapes, luxurious hotels, and immersive wildlife experiences. This curated itinerary seamlessly blends coastal charm, cultural richness, and awe-inspiring safari adventures.
highlights: 1 night at Mantis No 5 in Gqeberha, then 2 at The Plettenberg
1 night at Rosenhof Country House in the Klein Karoo
2 nights at Tilney Manor in Sanbona with Big Five game drives and walks
2 nights at Grootbos Forest Lodge with flower safari and fynbos horseback ride
Franschhoek wine country at Leeu Estate, finishing at One&Only Cape Town
14-day car rental with GPS for self-drive flexibility

safaris.name: 4 Day Kruger Exclusive Getaway with Lion Sands Narina
safaris.summary: If you’re seeking a getaway like no other, look no further than the Kruger. Embark on a safari at one of the private Kruger National Park concessions for a stay of unrivaled luxury.
highlights: 3 nights at Lion Sands Narina Lodge on the Sabie River
Private 5,000-hectare Tinga Concession within Kruger National Park
Morning, evening and night game drives tracking the Big Five
Guided bush walks with a ranger and tracker
Luxury Suite with private plunge pool overlooking the river
Round-trip road transfers from Skukuza Airport included

safaris.name: 4 Day Victoria Falls Rovos Rail Journey
safaris.summary: Experience a four-day journey through the most scenic areas of Southern Africa starting in Pretoria and ending at the magnificent Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe.
highlights: 3 nights aboard Rovos Rail in a 5-star Pullman Suite
Departs Pretoria, travelling north through Warmbaths and across the Limpopo
114 km along one of Africa's longest straight stretches of railway
Game drive at The Hide in Hwange National Park
Disembark at Victoria Falls on the Zambezi River
All meals and beverages included, French Champagne excepted

safaris.name: 4-Day Fly-In Victoria Falls Ultimate Adventure
safaris.summary: This 4-day safari showcases the breathtaking beauty of the Zambezi River, the majestic mist of Victoria Falls, and the wildlife-rich Chobe National Park. Guests will indulge in luxury at Batonka Guest Lodge while embarking on exciting adventures, including a sundowner cruise, helicopter rides, and a full-day trip to the Chobe in Botswana.
highlights: 3 nights at Batonka Guest Lodge in Victoria Falls
Sundowner cruise on the Zambezi aboard the Pure Signature Deck
Sunrise walking tour of Victoria Falls with a 25-30 minute helicopter flight
Full-day crossing into Botswana for a Chobe game drive and boat cruise
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and all transfers included

safaris.name: 4-Day Malaria-Free Botlierskop Safari
safaris.summary: Botlierskop Tented Lodge, nestled in the heart of the Garden Route in South Africa, offers a unique and luxurious safari experience in a malaria-free area. This private game reserve spans over 4,200 hectares of diverse landscapes, providing habitat for a wide array of wildlife. The lodge provides a perfect blend of adventure, luxury, and conservation, making it an ideal destination for those seeking an immersive and comfortable wildlife experience in South Africa.
highlights: 3 nights at Botlierskop Tented Lodge on a 4,200-hectare private reserve
Malaria-free Big Five game drives in the Garden Route
Swap a drive for a horseback safari or 60-minute spa treatment
Bird hide visits and dinner served under the stars
Round-trip 4x4 transfers from George Airport included

safaris.name: 4-Day Ultra-Lux Safari at Lion Sands Ivory Lodge
safaris.summary: Lion Sands Ivory Lodge offers unparalleled exclusivity for those seeking solitude and luxury. Nestled by the river, its eight villas provide an intimate viewing of the reserve’s abundant wildlife. Whether from your bed, deck, private plunge pool, or the guest spa, Ivory Lodge presents one of Africa’s most pristine vistas.
highlights: 3 nights at Lion Sands Ivory Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Stay in one of just eight riverside villas with private plunge pools
Twice-daily game drives plus guided bush walks with expert trackers
Evening drives for nocturnal wildlife and exceptional stargazing
All meals, selected drinks and Skukuza Airport transfers included

safaris.name: 5-Day All-inclusive Luxury Western Chobe Safari
highlights: 4 nights at Muchenje Safari Lodge in Western Chobe National Park
Twice-daily game drives plus night safaris with gourmet dinners
Full-day Sedudu boat cruise along the Chobe River
Sunrise guided walking safari and mokoro canoe excursion
Cultural visit to a local village and schools
All meals, drinks, park fees and Kasane Airport transfers included

safaris.name: 6 Day Romantic Chobe & Okavango Safari
safaris.summary: The private Ngoma Safari Lodge, is located on the edge of a plateau, offering endless views over the seasonal Chobe flood plain. Thereafter visit Little Machaba, an intimate oasis nestled in the riverine trees.
highlights: 2 nights at Ngoma Safari Lodge overlooking the Chobe floodplains
Full-day Chobe safari with river cruise and picnic lunch
Night drives and walking safaris in the Chobe Forest Reserve
3 nights at Little Machaba, a four-tent camp in the Khwai Concession
Mokoro dugout canoe safari through the Okavango waterways
Scenic light-aircraft flights between Kasane, Khwai and Maun

safaris.name: 7-Day South African Safari & City Experience
safaris.summary: From Big Five game drives at Hamiltons Tented Camp to coastal luxury in Cape Town, this 7-day journey blends South Africa’s wild bushveld with its iconic cityscape.
highlights: 3 nights at Hamiltons Tented Camp in Greater Kruger
Twice-daily Big Five game drives on a private concession
Bush dinners under the stars with selected beverages included
3 nights at The Cape Milner, walking distance to the waterfront
Two free days in Cape Town for Table Mountain and the Winelands
All scheduled flights from Johannesburg and internal transfers included

safaris.name: 10-Day Kruger to Cape Luxury Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the best of both worlds with this luxurious package: exceptional wildlife viewing, hearty bush meals, and opulent lodging. Explore Cape Town, renowned for its stunning Winelands, majestic mountains, and vibrant coastal scenery, all from your luxurious accommodations at the base of Table Mountain.
highlights: 3 nights at Kings Camp in Timbavati, then 2 at Leopard Hills in Sabi Sand
Twice-daily open-vehicle game drives with optional walking safaris
Big Five viewing including Sabi Sand's renowned leopard sightings
Ultimate Elephant Experience at Elephant Whispers with bush picnic
4 nights at Camissa House at the foot of Table Mountain
All internal flights from Johannesburg to the bush to Cape Town

safaris.name: 3 Day Chobe Fly-in Safari
safaris.summary: This outstanding three-day safari will give you the opportunity to gain an insight into the Chobe National Park which is renowned for having the largest herds of elephants in Africa, whilst still enjoying the classic luxury and comfort of the iconic Chobe Game Lodge.
highlights: 2 nights at Chobe Game Lodge, the only property inside Chobe National Park
Open-vehicle game drives along the Chobe Riverfront with expert guides
Sundowner cruise on the Chobe River past bathing elephants, hippos and crocodiles
Big Five viewing among Africa's largest elephant herds
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Kasane plus all transfers

safaris.name: 4-Day Malaria-free Big 5 Mhondoro Safari
safaris.summary: Mhondoro Game Reserve, situated in the malaria-free Welgevonden Game Reserve in South Africa's Limpopo Province, offers an exceptional safari experience. This private game reserve is known for its stunning natural beauty, diverse wildlife, and luxurious accommodations. Guests at Mhondoro can indulge in various safari activities, including guided game drives and walking safaris led by experienced rangers and trackers.
highlights: 3 nights in a luxury pool suite at Mhondoro Game Lodge
Set in malaria-free Welgevonden Game Reserve, Limpopo
Two daily safari activities: game drives and guided walks
Big Five sightings with skilled rangers and trackers
Round-trip road transfers from OR Tambo Airport included

safaris.name: 4-Day Nottens Camp All-Inclusive Safari
safaris.summary: Notten's Bush Camp, located in the heart of South Africa's Sabi Sand Game Reserve, is a family-run and operated safari camp known for its authentic and intimate bush experience. This camp stands out for its rustic charm and commitment to providing a genuine African wildlife adventure. With no electricity in the guest rooms, the camp offers a unique, off-the-grid experience, illuminated by lanterns and candles, creating a cozy and romantic atmosphere. Personalized service, attention to detail, and a deep respect for nature make Notten's Bush Camp a highly sought-after destination for safari enthusiasts.
highlights: 3 nights at Notten's Bush Camp, one of just 9 private suites
Twice-daily game drives and bush walks in the Sabi Sand
Big Five tracking in one of South Africa's richest reserves
Day excursion into Kruger National Park
Cultural visit to the local Shangaan community
Return flights JNB to Skukuza with road transfers to camp

safaris.name: 5 Day Glamping Fly-in Safari to the Greater Kruger
safaris.summary: Closer to nature in the Kruger with Honeyguide Khoka Moya, a unique African Bush Experience
highlights: 4 nights at Honeyguide Khoka Moya in the Manyeleti Private Game Reserve
Twice-daily Big Five game drives across a 23,000-hectare reserve
Off-road tracking and night drives for nocturnal species
Tented suites with outdoor decks overlooking the bushveld and waterhole
Dinner under the stars with elephants near camp and lions at night
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg via Hoedspruit included

safaris.name: 5 Day Madikwe Big 5 Safari Escape
safaris.summary: Just in case you're traveling to South Africa soon, you can enjoy incredible savings with this short-notice 5-day package based on a last-minute special available to you if you Book & Travel within 21 days. Experience a Luxury Safari Adventure at the 5-Star Tuningi Safari Lodge located in the Malaria-Free Madikwe Game Reserve with opportunities to see the famous 'Big Five', & wild dogs a firm favorite in the 75000-hectare reserve. Enjoy top-tier hospitality in a friendly and relaxed environment.
highlights: 4 nights at 5-star Tuningi Safari Lodge in malaria-free Madikwe
Twice-daily game drives with qualified rangers across 75,000 hectares
Big Five tracking plus Madikwe's renowned wild dog sightings
Optional guided bush walks and in-suite massage treatments
All meals, drinks on drives, and round-trip Johannesburg transfers included

safaris.name: 5-Day Ultimate Fly-In Luxury Sabi Sand Safari
safaris.summary: This 5-star luxury safari experience takes place in the renowned Sabi Sands Game Reserve, which shares an unfenced border with Kruger National Park. Your stay includes two nights at the ultra-exclusive Savanna Private Game Reserve and two nights at Dulini River, where you will enjoy breathtaking views, exceptional wildlife encounters, and unparalleled luxury. Your journey offers exceptional Big Five sightings, fine cuisine, and world-class accommodation.
highlights: 2 nights at Savanna Private Game Reserve, then 2 at Dulini River
Twice-daily game drives in the Sabi Sand, renowned for leopard sightings
Big Five tracking with expert guides and bush walks
Private suites with heated plunge pools and outdoor showers
Bush breakfasts, sundowners and candlelit dinners under the stars
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg to Skukuza with all transfers

safaris.name: 7 Day Chobe & Delta Fly-in Tour
safaris.summary: This fly-in safari tour starts in the elegant five-start, fully Ecotourisim-certified safari lodge, that is the only property that is located inside the world-renowned Chobe National Park. The Chobe Game Lodge is set on the banks of the famous Chobe River. After three days you will be transferred by charter plane to Camp Okavango, situated in the heart of the Okavango Delta on the island of Nxaragha. This island is surrounded by water all year round which offers an authentic Okavango Delta water wilderness experience.
highlights: 3 nights at Chobe Game Lodge, the only property inside Chobe National Park
Sundowner cruise on the Chobe River at the water's edge

safaris.name: 10 Day Kwandwe, Garden Route and Cape Town

On this adventure, you will go out to the heart of Windhoek, experience the idyllic Okonjima Nature Reserve, search for desert-adapted Elephant at Mowani Mountain Lodge, visit Swakopmund where the Namibian sand dunes meet the beautiful Atlantic Ocean, and finally take in the impressive red dunes of Sossusvlei.

Enjoy Namibia’s most popular destinations on this compact guided tour that incorporates visits to the Kalahari and Namib deserts – including the famed Sossusvlei dunes, the intriguing coastal town of Swakopmund, the Twyfelfontein rock engravings and Etosha National Park.

Start with two luxurious nights at Mbano Manor in Victoria Falls, including a guided tour of the falls. Continue to the Khwai region of the Okavango Delta for four nights at Feline Fields Vintage Camp, where thrilling game drives and mokoro rides await. Then soar by helicopter to Feline Fields Lodge in the Kalahari Desert for three serene nights of desert adventures and starlit dinners. With all transfers included, this journey is a seamless and unforgettable escape for couples seeking connection and wonder.
highlights: 2 nights at Mbano Manor with a guided tour of Victoria Falls
4 nights at Feline Fields Vintage Camp in the Khwai region
Game drives, mokoro rides and walking safaris in the Okavango Delta

Heading towards the coastline, your next stop is a town that encompasses indigenous forests, pristine beaches, sandstone cliffs and an idyllic lagoon. Knysna offers a rush of adventure activities, exciting festivals and world-class golf courses. Then, marvel in an unforgettable safari experience with Shamwari Game Reserve showcasing its passion for wildlife conservation and phenomenal BIG 5 game viewing.

safaris.name: 4-Day Gorilla Safari Experience

This area offers a unique opportunity for visitors to encounter the endangered mountain gorillas in their natural habitat, a profoundly moving and unforgettable experience. Mahogany Springs Lodge, located in the Buhoma sector of Uganda's Bwindi Impenetrable National Park, is a premier destination for travelers seeking a memorable gorilla trekking experience. This luxurious lodge is renowned for its exceptional location, offering stunning views of the surrounding forest and river.

Road transfers from Durban through to Maputo Airport included

safaris.name: 8-Day Ultra-Lux Fly-In Madikwe to Chobe Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the ultimate luxury safari, starting at Jamala Madikwe Safari Lodge in the Madikwe Game Reserve, where colonial elegance meets African wilderness. Enjoy thrilling game drives, personalized service, and world-class comfort while exploring the Big Five. Then, float into pure indulgence at Savute Elephant Lodge, a Belmond Safari in Chobe National Park. Known for its large elephant herds and spectacular wildlife, this ultra-luxurious lodge offers gourmet dining, serene spa treatments, and unforgettable safari adventures in the heart of the Savute region.
highlights: 3 nights at Jamala Madikwe Royal Safari Lodge in Madikwe Game Reserve
Big Five game drives across Madikwe with optional guided walking safari
4 nights at Belmond Savute Elephant Lodge in Chobe National Park
Twice-daily drives through the Savute region's vast elephant herds
Private dining under the stars and spa treatments between drives
All transfers, internal flights and Botswana park fees included

safaris.name: 8-Day Ultra-Lux Mauritius Island Holiday
highlights: 7 nights at The Oberoi Beach Resort in a Luxury Pavilion
All meals and local beverages included throughout the stay
Snorkelling, glass-bottom boat rides and kayaking in the lagoon
Windsurfing, wakeboarding, paddleboarding and Hobie Cat sailing
Spa treatments inspired by the island's natural surrounds
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and private airport transfers

safaris.name: 8-Day Ultra-lux Tengile and Tswalu Fly-In Safari
safaris.summary: This journey seamlessly combines opulence and excitement, highlighting premier safari destinations in South Africa. Journeying from the famed Sabi Sands Game Reserve to the sweeping Kalahari Desert. Every day is filled with distinct wildlife sightings and the epitome of luxury.
highlights: 3 nights at andBeyond Tengile River Lodge in the Sabi Sand
Overnight at The Saxon Hotel & Spa in Johannesburg
3 nights at Tswalu The Motse in the Kalahari Reserve
Habituated meerkat encounter and horse riding across the Kalahari
Private vehicle, dedicated guide and tracker, plus dinner at Klein JAN
Round-trip flights from Johannesburg and safari charter to Tswalu

safaris.name: 9 Day Diverse Namibia
safaris.summary: Experience the incredible wonders Namibia has to offer with this amazing 9-day safari. This tour is created on past client experiences but you are welcome to replace your accommodation to a level that suits your comfort preference and your wallet. Our travel experts will be happy to assist you with alternative options.
highlights: 2 nights at Kulala Adventurer Camp on the red dunes of Sossusvlei
2 nights at Hansa Hotel in Swakopmund with optional Walvis Bay catamaran cruise
2 nights at Damaraland Camp tracking desert-adapted wildlife near Brandberg Mountain
2 nights at Ongava Tented Camp with game drives in Etosha National Park
Sunken waterhole hide at Ongava for close-up wildlife viewing
Optional sunrise hot-air balloon flight over the Sossusvlei desert

safaris.name: 9 Day Ultra-Lux Fly-in Namibia
safaris.summary: On this Ultra-lux adventure, you will discover Namibia in an extravagant and unique way. Visiting the iconic canyon landscapes along the Fish River. Enjoying sundowners on Shipwreck Lodge deck and stargazing between the colossal red dunes of Sossusvlei.
highlights: 2 nights each at Fish River Lodge, &Beyond Sossusvlei Desert Lodge, Shipwreck Lodge and Ongava Lodge
Aerial views of Fish River Canyon on the safari flight in
Stargazing through suite skylights between the red dunes of Sossusvlei
Sundowners on deck at Shipwreck Lodge on the Skeleton Coast
Twice-daily game activities at Ongava Lodge in Etosha West
Private charter flights between all lodges from Windhoek

safaris.name: 9-Day Exquisite Tanzania Wilderness Safari
safaris.summary: Embark on a luxurious safari through Tanzania, discovering the breathtaking beauty of the "Garden of Eden," the vast wilderness, and Tanzania's stunning landscapes.
highlights: 1 night at Arusha Coffee Lodge with a guided coffee plantation walk
1 night at Melia Ngorongoro Lodge overlooking the crater
2 nights at Siringit Serengeti Camp with daily game drives and a bush picnic
2 nights at Siringit Migration Camp tracking the Great Migration herds
2 nights at Lemala Mpingo Ridge in Tarangire, home to large elephant herds
All meals, local beverages, transfers and conservation fees included

safaris.name: 9-Day Kenya & Rwanda Safari: Big Five, Maasai Mara & Gorilla Trekking Tour
safaris.summary: Embark on a thrilling 9-day Kenya and Rwanda safari combining Big Five game viewing with unforgettable gorilla trekking. Explore Kenya’s iconic Maasai Mara, Lake Naivasha, and Amboseli National Park, home to elephants and views of Mount Kilimanjaro. Fly to Rwanda for a cultural tour of Kigali and a once-in-a-lifetime gorilla trekking adventure in Volcanoes National Park. Track golden monkeys and visit the Red Rocks community project. This diverse East African safari offers wildlife, culture, and landscapes—perfect for nature lovers and adventure seekers.
highlights: 2 nights at Mara Sopa Lodge with game drives in the Maasai Mara
Boat safari on Lake Naivasha and walking tour on Crescent Island
2 nights at Amboseli Sopa Lodge with elephants and Kilimanjaro views
Kigali city tour including the Genocide Memorial
Gorilla trekking in Volcanoes National Park from Ingagi Park View
Golden monkey tracking in the Virunga Mountains on the final day

safaris.name: 9-Day Luxury Botswana Wetlands to Wilderness Safari
safaris.summary: Experience the wilderness of the Okavango Delta in the ultimate luxury filled with water-based activities on the lagoons and channels.
highlights: 5 nights at Mopiri Camp in the Okavango Delta, then 3 at Mankwe Tented Retreat
Water-based safari by boat and mokoro through papyrus-lined channels
Spot hippos, crocodiles, sitatunga and the rare Pel's fishing owl
Twice-daily game drives in Moremi tracking lion, leopard and buffalo
Sundowner cruise on the lagoon and bush dinners under the stars
Light-aircraft flights from Maun via Mopiri to Khwai included

safaris.name: 9-Day Opulent Cape Town & Sabi Sand Safari
safaris.summary: Embark on a Luxurious 9-Day Safari Across Southern Africa! From the breathtaking beaches of Cape Town to the awe-inspiring wildlife of Sabi Sand, this exclusive journey offers the perfect blend of adventure and relaxation. Ideal for families and small groups, it's an unforgettable escape into the heart of Africa's beauty.
highlights: 4 nights at Mount Nelson, A Belmond Hotel in Cape Town
Full-day Cape Peninsula tour with Boulders Beach penguins and Cape Point
4 nights at Cheetah Plains in the Sabi Sand on a fully inclusive basis
Twice-daily Big Five game drives in private zero-emission vehicles
Guided bush walks with expert field guides and trackers
All internal flights and transfers between Cape Town, Hoedspruit and Johannesburg

safaris.name: 9-Day Wild Encounters: Kenya’s Big Five & Uganda’s Gentle Giants
safaris.summary: This 9-day adventure combines the best of Kenya’s legendary wildlife and landscapes with Rwanda’s lush forests and gorilla trekking experiences. From the iconic plains of the Maasai Mara to the waters of Lake Naivasha, the elephant-studded vistas of Amboseli, and the misty mountains of Volcanoes National Park, this journey is designed for wildlife lovers, nature enthusiasts, and cultural explorers.
highlights: 2 nights at Mara Sopa Lodge with game drives across the Maasai Mara
Boat ride on Lake Naivasha and walking safari on Crescent Island
2 nights at Amboseli Sopa Lodge with elephant herds beneath Mt. Kilimanjaro
2 nights at 5-star Gorilla Leisure Lodge near Bwindi Impenetrable Forest
One hour trekking with endangered mountain gorillas in Bwindi
Internal flights from Nairobi to Entebbe and on to Kisoro included
